use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn read_all_files(root: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for entry in WalkDir::new(root) {
        let entry = entry.unwrap();
        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(entry.path()).unwrap_or_default();
        results.push(content);
    }
    results
}
